headline: Aerospace Stocks Q1 In Review: TransDigm (NYSE:TDG) Vs Peers
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how aerospace stocks fared in Q1, starting with TransDigm (NYSE:TDG).
